expectations.text: Checks for meta title and description presence and quality
expectations.evidence: Section 1.2 flags missing meta description as Critical. Section 2 analyzes title tag: 'Sample Page' rated as Poor, 11 characters, too short, recommends 50-60 chars with keywords.

expectations.text: Checks Open Graph tags (og:title, og:description, og:image)
expectations.evidence: Section 1.3 explicitly checks Open Graph tags as 'Missing Meta Tags (Recommended)' with severity Medium. Provides full og:title, og:description, og:type, og:url, og:image recommendations with example HTML.

Section 3 'Structured Data (JSON-LD) Analysis' provides thorough evaluation: status 'Not Present', impact analysis (no rich results eligibility), and recommends WebSite, Organization, and BreadcrumbList schemas with full JSON-LD code examples.
Section 1.3 flags missing canonical URL as High severity: 'Without a canonical tag, search engines may index duplicate versions of the same page'. Provides fix with example HTML.

expectations.text: References SEO item codes in findings
expectations.evidence: No SEO item codes (SEO-01, SEO-02, etc.) appear in the output. Issues are organized by custom section numbers (1.1, 1.2, 1.3, etc.) without reference to any standardized item code system.
